bird.name: 褐秋沙鸭
bird.summary: 褐秋沙鸭（台湾作髮冠秋沙）（学名：Mergus octosetaceus），是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 特征 褐秋沙鸭体重约983克，翼长约196.2毫米，嘴峰长约56.1毫米，喙宽度约7.9毫米，喙厚度约10.4毫米，跗蹠长约38.6毫米，尾长约81毫米。褐秋沙鸭在其分布区内为…

relations.subject: 褐秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: The Brazilian mergansers are very sensitive to habitat degradation and loss primarily due to human actions
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 褐秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: A major threat to the birds' survival is the issue of silting of rivers caused by the expansion of farming activities, mining, watershed degradation and soil erosion, as well as deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 褐秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Other threats include inbreeding, pesticides and predation
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

relations.subject: 褐秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Very few individuals survive from these threats and extinction may be imminent. People hunting the birds for food and collecting them for exhibition specimens contributed to the decline of the species
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
